login.title: Welcome Back

login.fieldValidation: Welcome to the Agora Cosmica Beta Program. This early access is available exclusively to our invited testers. Please sign in with your beta credentials.

preferences.hint: Click any section below to expand and modify settings

tooltips.voice: Configure text-to-speech settings for spoken responses. Different services offer various voice qualities.
tooltips.speech: Configure speech recognition for voice input. This allows you to speak to the AI instead of typing.
tooltips.model: Advanced settings for the underlying language model. These options are limited during beta testing.
tooltips.language: Interface language setting. Conversations are available in 12 languages regardless of this setting.
tooltips.privacy: Manage your privacy preferences and cookie settings. You can change your consent choices at any time.
tooltips.help: Manage help tips and tutorial preferences. Reset hidden tips to see them again.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

language.title: Display Language
language.conversationNote: Note: Conversations support 12 languages regardless of display language setting.

voice.title: Voice
voice.description: Voice for live conversations with the figures
voice.privacyNote: Voices generated on our servers in Falkenstein and Nuremberg. Audio held in RAM only and deleted after each request.
voice.smartRouting: Auto-selected based on your language: German → OpenAI, English → Kokoro
voice.gpt4oNote: GPT-4o TTS works best with English content. For non-English languages, the standard OpenAI TTS may provide better quality.
voice.kokoroNote: Self-hosted Kokoro TTS on EU servers. Zero data retention. All audio processing stays in Germany.

voiceSelection.title: Voice Selection
voiceSelection.scopeNote: These voices power live conversations with the figures. Stories, prisms and councils come with their own handpicked narrators.
voiceSelection.openaiPreviewCost: Preview uses OpenAI API and costs credits (~$0.015 per preview). Use sparingly.

speech.title: Voice Input
speech.description: Select which service processes your voice input
speech.privacyNote: Speech recognition runs on our own servers. Your voice is held in RAM only and deleted after each request.
speech.shortcut: You can quickly toggle between text and voice input with
speech.shortcutTip: You can quickly toggle between text and voice input with
speech.mobileNotice: Beta Voice Input: Speech recognition has limited support on mobile browsers. For reliable voice input, we recommend waiting for our mobile app.

ios.title: Safari Microphone Setup
ios.intro: For persistent microphone permissions in Safari on iPhone/iPad:
ios.step1b: button (left side in Safari address bar)
ios.benefit: After this one-time setup, no permission prompts! (Note: Chrome on iOS already works without this)

model.title: Language Model
model.description: AI model powering your wisdom conversations
model.aboutText: OpenRouter provides access to Qwen3 235B and other leading models with automatic fallback and competitive pricing.
model.privacyZDRDesc: Data stored in memory only during inference, deleted immediately after
model.privacyRoutingDesc: Your data is never used to train models
model.privacyFailoverDesc: Access to multiple leading AI models through a single key

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage your API keys for AI services.
apiKeys.securityNotice: Your API keys are stored securely in your browser and never sent to our servers. They're only used to make requests directly to the respective services on your behalf.
apiKeys.openRouterDesc: For AI conversations (LLM). Voice & speech are self-hosted.
apiKeys.privacyText: Audio is processed on our self-hosted servers in Germany with zero retention. Free-tier conversations use EU servers with zero retention. With your own OpenRouter key, the ZDR toggle below controls whether requests can be logged.
apiKeys.errorInvalid: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
apiKeys.errorValidate: Failed to validate key. Please try again.
apiKeys.errorSave: Failed to save key. Please try again.
apiKeys.errorClear: Failed to clear key. Please try again.
apiKeys.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to remove your {provider} API key?
apiKeys.openAIPrivacyNoTrainingDesc: Your audio data is not used for training
apiKeys.openAIPrivacyZDRDesc: Request Zero Data Retention for eligible accounts
apiKeys.zdrDescription: On by default. Routes only to providers that don't log your requests (typically US-based). Turning off allows any provider, some may store data.

aiModelKey.title: Your Key & AI Model
aiModelKey.description: Your optional OpenRouter key and the model that powers your conversations
aiModelKey.modelTagline: Frontier-class. Same model on free tier and with your own key.
aiModelKey.statusFree: Free tier active. 30 conversations per day.
aiModelKey.statusByok: Your OpenRouter key is active. No daily limit.
aiModelKey.keySectionIntro: Add an OpenRouter key to bypass the free-tier limit. You see and control your usage.

aboutOpenRouter.title: About OpenRouter
aboutOpenRouter.body1: OpenRouter is a neutral routing service that forwards your request to the AI model you choose. We use it because it lets you bring your own account, billing, and quota.
aboutOpenRouter.body2: Your key stays in your browser. We never see it.

aiModelKey.encryptionNote: Your key is encrypted in your browser (AES-256-GCM) and never sent to our servers.

custom.modelHelp: The identifier your local server shows, for example qwen2.5-7b-instruct.
custom.keyDisclosure: My endpoint needs an API key
custom.keyPlaceholder: Leave empty for LM Studio or Ollama
custom.corsHelp: Browser blocked? Check CORS for LM Studio or Ollama

localMode.title: Local Mode
localMode.description: Run any combination of the three services on your own machine: LLM, voice, transcription.
localMode.toggleHelp: When on, conversations route to a local LLM you run (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM) and audio routes to our local containers. Live voice remains hosted for now.

hardwareBanner.full: NVIDIA GPU detected. The full pipeline (LLM, EN + DE TTS, STT) can run locally with docker compose --profile nvidia up.
hardwareBanner.apple: Apple Silicon Mac detected. EN TTS + STT run via docker; for DE local TTS run scripts/setup-local-tts-apple.sh once.
hardwareBanner.reduced: Limited hardware detected. EN + STT run locally; DE will fall back to our cloud.
hardwareBanner.unknown: Hardware not detected. Local Mode may still work, try it.
hardwareBanner.hosted: Local Mode not available, using cloud.

llm.label: Run LLM locally
llm.help: Route chat to an OpenAI-compatible endpoint you run (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp).

tts.label: Run voice synthesis locally
tts.help: Route read-aloud audio to your local Kokoro container (English) and Qwen3-TTS service (German).

stt.label: Run transcription locally
stt.help: Route microphone audio to your local Whisper container instead of our cloud transcription.

localMode.honestPrivacy: When all three services below run locally, no conversation, voice, or text data leaves your machine. The same models we run on our servers can run on yours.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Your privacy is protected by default
privacy.intro: We respect your privacy and have designed Agora Cosmica to work without tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
privacy.cookieToggleInfo: To manage cookie preferences directly, please visit our privacy policy page where you can adjust your consent settings.
privacy.dataInfo: We use no tracking cookies. Your language preference and display settings are saved locally on your device and never sent to any server.

help.title: Help & Tips
help.intro: Agora Cosmica provides helpful tips and guidance throughout your journey. If you've hidden any tips, you can reset them here.
help.resetDescription: Click the button below to show all help tips again. This will reset any "Don't show again" choices you've made.
help.resetConfirmation: Are you sure you want to reset all help tips? They will appear again throughout the app.
help.resetSuccess: Help tips have been reset successfully!
help.tipInfo: Help tips appear when you first encounter new features or need guidance. You can always hide them again using "Don't show this again".

mission.title: Building Bridges to the Wisdom of Remarkable People
mission.text:
Agora Cosmica is a project of ChipMates gemeinnützige GmbH, a small German nonprofit based in Freiburg im Breisgau. We work to make wisdom from history accessible to everyone, freed from academic barriers, paywalls, and ads.

The platform brings together 30 remarkable people from philosophy, science, mysticism, art, and activism — opening a doorway for anyone to begin their own journey with wisdom traditions.

values.title: Our Values
values.gratitude: Gratitude: Every era and tradition has something to teach us.
values.curiosity: Curiosity: We learn with you, not about you.
values.openness: Openness: Nonprofit. Open source. Built for the community.

barriers.title: Breaking Down Barriers
barriers.intro: The ideas of history's greatest minds shouldn't be locked behind academic barriers. They belong to everyone.
barriers.geographic: Geographic: Available worldwide, around the clock
barriers.economic: Economic: Open source, nonprofit. No paywalls, no ads

vision.title: Our Definition of Success
vision.text: We celebrate when people outgrow us — moving from our introductions to primary texts, from AI conversations to human teachers, from curiosity to their own deeper exploration. That is the mission.

community.title: Our Promise
community.text: We're early in this journey and we'll make mistakes. When we oversimplify, misrepresent, or miss the mark, tell us at agoracosmica@chipmates.ai. We're not building for you, but with you.

help.established: Founded 2023 as GmbH · gemeinnützige status since 2025 · HRB 728848 Amtsgericht Freiburg

consent.heading: Before you begin
consent.aiNotice: The figures here are AI interpretations, not the real historical people. Everything they say, whether in live conversation or prepared in advance, is generated by artificial intelligence (AI) and can be inaccurate, incomplete, or misleading. Always verify anything important against trusted primary sources.
consent.ageCheckbox: I confirm that I am at least 16 years old or have the consent of a parent or guardian.
consent.termsCheckbox: I have read and accept the

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: At Agora Cosmica, we respect your privacy and are committed to being transparent about our use of cookies and similar technologies.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They help the website function properly and provide a better user experience.

cookieFreeApproach.title: Our Cookie-Free Approach
cookieFreeApproach.description: We have designed Agora Cosmica to operate without the use of tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or marketing cookies. This means you can use our application without being tracked or profiled.

essentialStorage.title: Essential Technical Storage
essentialStorage.description: We only use essential technical storage that is strictly necessary for the application to function:
essentialStorage.sessionPurpose: Maintains your session state while using the application. If you arrive from a Google ad, the click identifier (gclid) is held here until you consent to ad measurement or the tab closes.
essentialStorage.localPurpose: Saves your language preference and your consent decisions (for example agb_consent, and agc_ad_consent for ad measurement)

securityCookie.title: Security Cookie (__cf_bm)
securityCookie.description: We use one technically necessary cookie set by Cloudflare for bot protection and firewall (WAF). It does not track you across sites, contains no personal information, and is required for the application to defend against automated abuse.
securityCookie.name: __cf_bm
securityCookie.legalBasis: Technically necessary, § 25 (2) Nr. 2 TDDDG (no consent required)

whatWeDontUse.title: What We Don't Use
whatWeDontUse.description: Apart from the security cookie above, we do NOT use:
whatWeDontUse.analytics: Analytics cookies or tracking (e.g., Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel)

privacyRights.title: Your Privacy Rights
privacyRights.description: Since we don't use tracking cookies, there are no cookie preferences to manage. Your privacy is protected by default. The minimal technical storage we use is essential for the application to remember your basic preferences like language selection.

privacyAnalytics.title: Privacy-Preserving Analytics
privacyAnalytics.description: We count anonymous, aggregate events with our own server-side counter (no third-party service, no cookie, no pixel). It records only structural labels such as the endpoint used, the language, and a 2-letter country code from the Cloudflare edge. No IP addresses are stored in analytics, no individuals are tracked, and no profiles are built.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: If we make any changes to our cookie practices, we will update this policy and notify users appropriately.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about our cookie policy or privacy practices, please contact us through our main website.

quickHelp.aiDisclosure: AI Echoes are AI-generated portrayals inspired by historical teachings. Pre-written stories involve human-AI collaboration. Live conversations and voices are generated entirely by AI.

step3.title: Start Talking
step3.techNote: Voice works best on desktop Chrome/Edge/Safari

echoes.title: About AI Echoes

whatTheyAre.title: What AI Echoes Are
whatTheyAre.description: AI-generated educational portrayals of historical figures:
points: Inspired by their documented writings and teachings
Pre-written stories produced with human-AI collaboration
Live conversations and voices generated entirely by AI
Educational interpretations, not authentic historical representations

whatTheyAreNot.title: What They Are Not
points: Not the real historical figures
Not attempts to recreate the actual person
Not comprehensive biographies, but representations of each figure's teachings and tradition
Cannot accurately represent everything they thought or wrote
May misinterpret questions or provide inaccurate responses

echoes.quote: When you meet Plato here, you are engaging with an AI interpretation inspired by his philosophy. A digital echo of his wisdom, not the person himself.
echoes.note: Always verify important information with primary sources. AI Echoes are designed for educational exploration, not as authoritative historical sources.
echoes.essayLink: Read the essay: Why we speak for the dead

nonprofit.label: We're a nonprofit:
nonprofit.text: Our mission is sharing wisdom, not collecting data. Clear your data anytime in Settings.

dataStorage.title: On Your Device
dataStorage.description: Stories, settings, and your API key never leave your browser
points: Encrypted with AES-256-GCM in IndexedDB
Encryption key locked to this device, never transmitted
One click to clear everything

voice.title: Voice & Speech
voice.description: Self-hosted in Germany. No third-party audio processing.
points: Two servers in Falkenstein and Nuremberg (Hetzner)
Audio held in RAM only, deleted after each request
Daily check confirms nothing is logged or stored

tracking.title: Zero Tracking
tracking.description: No analytics scripts, no user profiles, no third-party trackers.
points: No trackers from Google, Meta, or anyone else
One technical cookie that helps block bots
Just anonymous error counts so we can fix bugs

aiModels.title: AI Models
aiModels.description: Same model on both paths. Your choice of provider.
points: Qwen3 235B for free tier and your-own-key alike
Free: via Nebius (Finland, EU). DPA signed, ZDR enabled.
Your key: via OpenRouter. ZDR routing on by default.

tour.title: Interactive Tour
tour.description: Take a 2-3 minute guided journey through all features:
tour.note: Perfect for new users or showing the app to others!

welcome.title: Agora Cosmica

explainer.tagline: A Living Library You Can Talk To
explainer.bodyPart1: Welcome. Thirty remarkable people from philosophy, science, art, and activism, brought to life in first-person portraits you can
explainer.mission: A doorway to wisdom. Accessible for everyone.

welcome.quote: Follow your bliss and the universe will open doors where there were only walls.
welcome.trustSignals: Nonprofit · Open Source · No tracking cookies, no profiling
welcome.seekerText: Questions, like stars, shine within you.
welcome.seekerAlt: The Seeker - your cosmic self with infinite potential within

factCheck.shadowIntro: Every figure here was chosen for what they gave to the world. Our Echos follow the light, they don't tell the whole story. What they leave out, we share here.

welcome.setupTime: ~5 minutes to set up your AI services,

language.title: Which language should figures speak?
language.cloudAudio: Full German support (cheaper TTS not yet available)

voice.title: Voice Input (Optional)
voice.description: Enable voice input to speak your philosophical questions instead of typing.

ios.title: For iPhone/iPad Safari:
ios.intro: To enable persistent microphone permission in Safari:
ios.step1b: button (left side in the Safari address bar)
ios.benefit: After this setup, Safari will never ask for permission again!

voice.fallback: You can also type your questions - both work great! (Chrome on iOS works without this setup)

guide.title: Get Your OpenRouter API Key
guide.whatIsKey: An API key is like a password that lets you use AI services. You only need to set this up once.
guide.step1: Click the button below to open OpenRouter in a new tab
guide.step2: Create a free account (Google, GitHub, or email)
guide.step3: Add credits in 'Credits' ($1 pays for ~100 hours!)
guide.step4: Go to 'Keys' and create a new key, then copy it
guide.reassurance: Don't worry - we'll guide you through each step. This usually takes 2-3 minutes.

deepInfraKey.title: Connect DeepInfra
deepInfraKey.pasteInstructions: Copy your API key from the DeepInfra website and paste it in the field below.
deepInfraKey.description: Your DeepInfra API key powers all AI services: conversations, voice, and speech recognition.
deepInfraKey.whereFindKey: Where do I find my API key? →
deepInfraKey.security: 🔒 Your key is encrypted and stored only in your browser. We never see or access it.
deepInfraKey.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
deepInfraKey.emptyKey: Please enter your DeepInfra API key

openRouterKey.title: Connect OpenRouter
openRouterKey.description: To chat with historical figures, you'll need an API key.
openRouterKey.security: 🔒 Your key is encrypted and stored only in your browser. We never see or access it.
openRouterKey.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
openRouterKey.emptyKey: Please enter your OpenRouter API key

openAIKey.title: Connect OpenAI for German Audio
openAIKey.description: For German text-to-speech, you need an OpenAI API key.
openAIKey.reason1: Few AI models support high-quality German TTS
openAIKey.reason2: OpenAI offers the best German audio quality today
openAIKey.reason3: We'll integrate cheaper alternatives as soon as available
openAIKey.openRouterNote: (Conversations use your DeepInfra key you just set up)
openAIKey.security: 🔒 Your key is encrypted and stored only in your browser. We never see or access it.
openAIKey.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
openAIKey.emptyKey: Please enter your OpenAI API key

downloading.title: 🚀 Setting Up AI Services
downloading.llmNote: Your DeepInfra key handles conversations, voice, and speech recognition.

success.title: All Set, Seeker!
success.subtitle: Your sanctuary is ready.
success.englishCheck3: All services ready - start chatting now!
success.germanCheck1: Secure & encrypted - your keys stay on your device
success.germanCheck3: All services ready - start chatting now!

wizard.valueBody: Use your own OpenRouter key. You pay OpenRouter directly, we take no cut.
wizard.benefit1: No daily limits on messages, councils, or summaries
wizard.benefit2: Same AI as the free tier
wizard.step1: Create a free account at OpenRouter
wizard.step2: Add credit ($5 lasts for months of daily use)
wizard.step3: Create an API key and paste it below
wizard.errorInvalid: Invalid key. Please check and try again.
wizard.zdrNote: On by default. Routes only to providers that don't store your data (typically US-based). Turning off allows any provider, some may log.
wizard.whyOpenRouter: Why OpenRouter? Easy sign-up, one key for many models, automatic failover if a provider goes down.
wizard.successBody: No more daily limits. Your conversations, councils, and summaries are now unlimited.

selfHost.valueBody: Your key, your data. You pay OpenRouter directly.
selfHost.benefit1: No daily limits, set your own pace
selfHost.successBody: Your key is saved. Conversations, councils, and summaries are ready.

votingPower.label: voting power
votingPower.formulaDetail: Complete all 4 chapters of one teaching to earn +1. Every fully completed figure (all 12 teachings mastered) adds another +1.
votingPower.encourageZero: Complete all 4 chapters of one teaching to earn your first voice.

tier.councilDesc: Vote, co-sign, and propose new ideas.
tier.nextListener: Complete a figure to become a Voice.
tier.nextVoice: Complete {remaining} more to join the Council.
tier.nextCouncil: Every 3 figures grants a new suggestion slot.

threshold.label: Support threshold
threshold.current: {n} community backers brings a suggestion to ChipMates review.
threshold.explainer: Council members submit ideas. Once submitted, every suggestion is visible to the community, and members back the ones they want. At {n} backers, ChipMates reviews it for the roadmap. The threshold scales as the community grows.

stats.tagline: We listen before we open the vote.

section.title: What should we build next?
section.subtitle: Browse what's on the table.
section.notice: Voting opens in the near future. Your voting power is already counted.

howSection.title: How governance works
howSection.subtitle: Tiers, slots, and the co-sign threshold.

dataCard.title: Save & restore your progress
dataCard.hint: Your voting power and conversations live on this device. Save them to a file you keep, or restore from one.
dataCard.backupAria: Back up your progress to a file
dataCard.restoreAria: Restore your progress from a file

category.languagesHint: Each new language means full translation, native voice casting, and audio production.
category.appsHint: Native apps for iOS and Android, alongside the web platform.
category.booksHint: Every figure's stories and prisms collected into a book.
category.figuresHint: Voices we haven't yet invited to the agora.
category.imageUpgradeHint: Replace the AI-generated portrait with one drawn by a dedicated illustrator.
category.voiceUpgradeHint: A dedicated voice actor for this figure. One recognizable voice, unified across every language and mode.

suggestPanel.title: Your suggestion slots
suggestPanel.subtitle: Earn 1 slot per 3 fully completed figures.
suggestPanel.lockedZero: Complete your first figure to start earning suggestion slots.
suggestPanel.lockedSlots: When voting opens, you'll be able to suggest a new figure or feature here.

submit.lockedHelper: We'll open voting once the community is large enough for every vote to carry weight. Your voting power is already counted.

footer.disclaimer: Non-binding signal. ChipMates is gemeinnützig. Your voice shapes the platform.
